title: Shadows and Gears
description: Deeper into the sanctuary, closer to father, closer to danger.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: Through the corridors, heart pounding. Blue-uniformed workers pass without noticing.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: There. That door has extra guards. Whatever they're protecting, it must be important.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Or it's where they're keeping your father!

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: We need to get past those guards.

opening.speaker: Guard
opening.text: Intruder alert! Sector seven! All units respond!

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Uh oh. That might be my fault. I may have knocked something over in the vent...

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: The guards jump up, look at each other, and run towards the sounds.

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: Through the chaos, into a... lovely warm cozy study. There, at a bench—your father.

closing.speaker: Father
closing.text: My clever girl, as soon as I saw the moth, I knew you'd find me.

choices.text: Stand between father and the cultists. Protect him, no matter what.
Create a distraction. Knock over equipment, cause chaos, give father time to escape!

puzzle.title: The Breath Between Chaos
puzzle.instructions: In the chaos, find your center. Breathe. Think. Act.
